MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-25-2021 - KAMBRIE KEITH, ESQ. APPEARING VIA COURTCALL FOR PLAINTIFF. ARASH MOUSSAVIAN, ESQ. APPEARING IN PERSON, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR ATTORNEY JENNIFER TUNDER, REPRESENTING DEFENDANT. THE COURT SET AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. JENNIFER TUNDER FOR FEB-05-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. APPEARANCE AT OSC ON 02/05/21 IN PERSON & NOT BY COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE WITH A CONTINUANCE FEE OF $60 TO BE PAID VIA E-FILING. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO FEB-03-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. PARTIES MAY APPEAR BY COURTCALL FOR TRIAL CALL ON 02/03/21. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. IF THE CASE IS RESOLVED, THEN THE COURT WILL WAIVE THE $250 SANCTIONS. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)
